data.name: {0}Continue now{1} or you will be redirected in {2} seconds.
data.value: {0}Continue now{1} or you will be redirected in {2} seconds.

data.name: 2fa has been disabled. You can reenable 2fa when you setup an authenticator app
data.value: 2fa has been disabled. You can reenable 2fa when you setup an authenticator app

data.name: Account roles and permissions for a single account.
data.value: Account roles and permissions for a single account.

data.name: All changes that have been made to the attached file.
data.value: All changes that have been made to the attached file.

data.name: All changes that have been made to the page.
data.value: All changes that have been made to the page.

data.name: All comments made on the given page.
data.value: All comments made on the given page.

data.name: All namespaces contained in the wiki.
data.value: All namespaces contained in the wiki.

data.name: All pages contained in the namespace.
data.value: All pages contained in the namespace.

data.name: All pages contained in the wiki.
data.value: All pages contained in the wiki.

data.name: An error occurred retrieving user information from the external provider.
data.value: An error occurred retrieving user information from the external provider.

data.name: An error occurred while adding the login.
data.value: An error occurred while adding the login.

data.name: An error occurred while creating the user.
data.value: An error occurred while creating the user.

data.name: An error occurred while processing your request.
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: Are you sure you want to continue with this deletion?
data.value: Are you sure you want to continue with this deletion?

data.name: Are you sure you want to continue?
data.value: Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?

data.name: Are you sure you want to detach
data.value: Are you sure you want to detach

data.name: Are you sure you want to log out of the application?
data.value: Are you sure you want to log out of the application?

data.name: Attach files by dropping them here or by manually selecting them below:
data.value: Attach files by dropping them here or by manually selecting them below:

data.name: Browse pages marked with various processing instructions to see what is in draft, pending deletion, protected, etc.
data.value: Browse pages marked with various processing instructions to see what is in draft, pending deletion, protected, etc.

data.name: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
data.value: Choose your preferred language for the interface.

data.name: Confirmation link to change email sent. Please check your email.
data.value: Confirmation link to change email sent. Please check your email.

data.name: Create your account and configure your basic profile details.
data.value: Create your account and configure your basic profile details.

data.name: Default password has not been changed
data.value: Default password has not been changed

data.name: Deleting '{0}' will move the page, all {1} revisions and associated file attachments to the deletion queue. This action can only be undone by an administrator or moderator. Continue?
data.value: Deleting '{0}' will move the page, all {1} revisions and associated file attachments to the deletion queue. This action can only be undone by an administrator or moderator. Continue?

data.name: Deleting '{0}' will move the page, with all {1} revisions and {2} file attachments to the deletion queue.
data.value: Deleting '{0}' will move the page, with all {1} revisions and {2} file attachments to the deletion queue.

data.name: Deleting '{0}' will permanently remove the account. All pages created or modified by this user will be attributed to a stand-in account and you will not be able to revert this action. Continue?
data.value: Deleting '{0}' will permanently remove the account. All pages created or modified by this user will be attributed to a stand-in account and you will not be able to revert this action. Continue?

data.name: Deleting '{0}' will permanently remove the account. All pages created or modified by this user will be attributed to a stand-in account. Continue?
data.value: Deleting '{0}' will permanently remove the account. All pages created or modified by this user will be attributed to a stand-in account. Continue?

data.name: Deleting '{0}' will permanently remove the menu item and you will not be able to revert this action. Continue?
data.value: Deleting '{0}' will permanently remove the menu item and you will not be able to revert this action. Continue?

data.name: Deleting revision {0} of "{1}" will move the page revision to the deletion queue. This action can only be undone by an administrator or moderator. Continue?
data.value: Deleting revision {0} of "{1}" will move the page revision to the deletion queue. This action can only be undone by an administrator or moderator. Continue?

data.name: Deleting the emoji '{0}' will permanently remove the image and any references to it will be orphaned. You will not be able to revert this deletion. Continue?
data.value: Deleting the emoji '{0}' will permanently remove the image and any references to it will be orphaned. You will not be able to revert this deletion. Continue?

data.name: Deleting the role '{0}' will revoke any permissions granted or denied by that role. Continue?
data.value: Deleting the role '{0}' will revoke any permissions granted or denied by that role. Continue?

data.name: Disabling 2FA does not change the keys used in authenticator apps.
data.value: Disabling 2FA does not change the keys used in authenticator apps.

data.name: Display Name is already in use.
data.value: Display Name is already in use.

data.name: Don't have access to your authenticator device?
data.value: Don't have access to your authenticator device?

data.name: Download a two-factor authenticator app like Microsoft Authenticator for {0} and {1} or Google Authenticator for {2} and {3}.
data.value: Download a two-factor authenticator app like Microsoft Authenticator for {0} and {1} or Google Authenticator for {2} and {3}.

data.name: Drop file attachments here or click to upload manually.
data.value: Drop file attachments here or click to upload manually.

data.name: Either the deleted pages queue is empty or your search criteria returned no results.
data.value: Either the deleted pages queue is empty or your search criteria returned no results.

data.name: Either there are no accounts configured or your search criteria returned no results.
data.value: Either there are no accounts configured or your search criteria returned no results.

data.name: Either there are no emojis configured or your search criteria returned no results.
data.value: Either there are no emojis configured or your search criteria returned no results.

data.name: Either there are no pages or your search criteria returned no results.
data.value: Either there are no pages or your search criteria returned no results.

data.name: Enter an internal path or external URL.
data.value: Enter an internal path or external URL.

data.name: Error loading external login information during confirmation.
data.value: Error loading external login information during confirmation.

data.name: Failed to add login info for LDAP stub account: {0}.
data.value: Failed to add login info for LDAP stub account: {0}.

data.name: Failed to create stub account for the LDAP credential: {0}.
data.value: Failed to create stub account for the LDAP credential: {0}.

data.name: Failed to locate the user account for the LDAP credential.
data.value: Failed to locate the user account for the LDAP credential.

data.name: Flushing the memory cache will cause any cached items to be dropped and require database hits as pages are requested. Continue?
data.value: Flushing the memory cache will cause any cached items to be dropped and require database hits as pages are requested. Continue?

data.name: Generating new recovery codes does not change the keys used in authenticator apps.
data.value: Generating new recovery codes does not change the keys used in authenticator apps.

data.name: Global configuration for security roles and membership.
data.value: Global configuration for security roles and membership.

data.name: Global configuration for the site menu item.
data.value: Global configuration for the site menu item.

data.name: Global configuration for the site menu.
data.value: Global configuration for the site menu.

data.name: Global configuration values for the wiki, its functionality, behavior, formatting and branding.
data.value: Global configuration values for the wiki, its functionality, behavior, formatting and branding.

data.name: If it's here, you should be able to find it.
data.value: If it's here, you should be able to find it.

data.name: If you lose your device and don't have the recovery codes you will lose access to your account.
data.value: If you lose your device and don't have the recovery codes you will lose access to your account.

data.name: If you reset your authenticator key your authenticator app will not work until you reconfigure it.
data.value: If you reset your authenticator key your authenticator app will not work until you reconfigure it.

data.name: If you wish to change the key used in an authenticator app you should reset your authenticator keys.
data.value: If you wish to change the key used in an authenticator app you should reset your authenticator keys.

data.name: It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users.
data.value: It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users.

data.name: Logging out will make sure that others can't use this session to make changes to the wiki. You'll need to log back in before making changes.
data.value: Logging out will make sure that others can't use this session to make changes to the wiki. You'll need to log back in before making changes.

data.name: Once you have scanned the QR code or input the key above, your two factor authentication app will provide you with a unique code. Enter the code in the confirmation box below.
data.value: Once you have scanned the QR code or input the key above, your two factor authentication app will provide you with a unique code. Enter the code in the confirmation box below.

data.name: Page revisions that have been deleted for the given page. These can be purged or restored.
data.value: Page revisions that have been deleted for the given page. These can be purged or restored.

data.name: Pages that have been deleted. Can be purged or restored.
data.value: Pages that have been deleted. Can be purged or restored.

data.name: Pages that have been linked to, but do not exist.
data.value: Pages that have been linked to, but do not exist.

data.name: Please check your email to confirm your account.
data.value: Please check your email to confirm your account.

data.name: Please check your email to reset your password.
data.value: Please check your email to reset your password.

data.name: Please click here to log in
data.value: Please click here to log in

data.name: Please enter both username and password.
data.value: Please enter both username and password.

data.name: Privacy and cookie policy have not been accepted.
data.value: Privacy and cookie policy have not been accepted.

data.name: Purging the page compilation statistics will delete all of the stored compilation statistics for all pages. Continue?
data.value: Purging the page compilation statistics will delete all of the stored compilation statistics for all pages. Continue?

data.name: Put these codes in a safe place.
data.value: Put these codes in a safe place.

data.name: Remove this {0} login from your account
data.value: Remove this {0} login from your account

data.name: Reverting "{0}" from revision {1} to {2} will rollback {3} changes.
data.value: Reverting "{0}" from revision {1} to {2} will rollback {3} changes.

data.name:
Reverting {0} from revision {1} to {2} will rollback {3} changes.
Reverting does not mean that changes will be lost however, the revert process will create a new revision with the reverted changes.

Are you sure you want to continue?
data.value:
Reverting {0} from revision {1} to {2} will rollback {3} changes.
Reverting does not mean that changes will be lost however, the revert process will create a new revision with the reverted changes.

Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: Reverting does not mean that changes will be lost however, the revert process will create a new revision with the reverted changes.
data.value: Reverting does not mean that changes will be lost however, the revert process will create a new revision with the reverted changes.

data.name: Review the differences between revisions of this page.
data.value: Review the differences between revisions of this page.

data.name: Save the page before uploading files.
data.value: Save the page before uploading files.

data.name: Scan the QR Code or enter this key <kbd>{0}</kbd> into your two factor authenticator app. Spaces and casing do not matter.
data.value: Scan the QR Code or enter this key <kbd>{0}</kbd> into your two factor authenticator app. Spaces and casing do not matter.

data.name: Swapping to the Development environment displays detailed information about the error that occurred.
data.value: Swapping to the Development environment displays detailed information about the error that occurred.

data.name: Thank you for confirming your email change.
data.value: Thank you for confirming your email change.

data.name: Thank you for confirming your email.
data.value: Thank you for confirming your email.

data.name: The account has been deleted and all content that was created or modified by this account has been attributed to an anonymized profile.
data.value: The account has been deleted and all content that was created or modified by this account has been attributed to an anonymized profile.

data.name: The compilation statistics for all wiki page operations.
data.value: The compilation statistics for all wiki page operations.

data.name: The current browser has been forgotten. When you login again from this browser you will be prompted for your 2fa code.
data.value: The current browser has been forgotten. When you login again from this browser you will be prompted for your 2fa code.

data.name: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.
data.value: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.

data.name: The email address was not supplied by the external provider.
data.value: The email address was not supplied by the external provider.

data.name: The external login was not added. External logins can only be associated with one account.
data.value: The external login was not added. External logins can only be associated with one account.

data.name: The external login was not removed.
data.value: The external login was not removed.

data.name: The page does not have any comments, why don't you add one?
data.value: The page does not have any comments, why don't you add one?

data.name: The requested page or revision does not exist.
data.value: The requested page or revision does not exist.

data.name: The selected page does not have any revisions.
data.value: The selected page does not have any revisions.

data.name: The specified user could not be found.
data.value: The specified user could not be found.

data.name: There are currently no missing pages being referenced by other wiki pages.
data.value: There are currently no missing pages being referenced by other wiki pages.

data.name: There are currently no pages which exist within namespaces.
data.value: There are currently no pages which exist within namespaces.

data.name: There are no compilation statistics available.
data.value: There are no compilation statistics available.

data.name: There are no deleted revisions for this page.
data.value: There are no deleted revisions for this page.

data.name: There are no menu items configured.
data.value: There are no menu items configured.

data.name: There are no orphaned page attachments.
data.value: There are no orphaned page attachments.

data.name: There are no pages which contain the selected processing instruction.
data.value: There are no pages which contain the selected processing instruction.

data.name: There are no security roles configured.
data.value: There are no security roles configured.

data.name: These are all of the page attachments that are no longer attached to any page revision.
data.value: These are all of the page attachments that are no longer attached to any page revision.

data.name: This account has been locked out, please try again later.
data.value: This account has been locked out, please try again later.

data.name: This action can only be undone by a moderator or administrator.
data.value: This action can only be undone by a moderator or administrator.

data.name: This display name will be visible publicly.
data.value: This display name will be visible publicly.

data.name: This file does not have any revisions.
data.value: This file does not have any revisions.

data.name: This is your profile, do with it what you may.
data.value: This is your profile, do with it what you may.

data.name: This process disables 2FA until you verify your authenticator app. If you do not complete your authenticator app configuration you may lose access to your account.
data.value: This process disables 2FA until you verify your authenticator app. If you do not complete your authenticator app configuration you may lose access to your account.

data.name: This will check the database integrity and validate all foreign keys. Continue?
data.value: This will check the database integrity and validate all foreign keys. Continue?

data.name: This will compile all pages in the wiki and store them in cache. This could take some time! Continue?
data.value: This will compile all pages in the wiki and store them in cache. This could take some time! Continue?

data.name: This will merge in all default configuration, but will not overwrite any of your currently configured settings. Continue?
data.value: This will merge in all default configuration, but will not overwrite any of your currently configured settings. Continue?

data.name: This will optimize the database indexes and structure. Continue?
data.value: This will optimize the database indexes and structure. Continue?

data.name: This will permanently delete the specified attachment. Continue?
data.value: This will permanently delete the specified attachment. Continue?

data.name: This will permanently delete the specified deleted revision. Continue?
data.value: This will permanently delete the specified deleted revision. Continue?

data.name: This will permanently delete the specified page, all revisions and attachments. Continue?
data.value: This will permanently delete the specified page, all revisions and attachments. Continue?

data.name: This will permanently purge all deleted page revisions for "{0}". Continue?
data.value: This will permanently purge all deleted page revisions for "{0}". Continue?

data.name: This will permanently purge all deleted pages. Continue?
data.value: This will permanently purge all deleted pages. Continue?

data.name: This will permanently purge all event logs. Continue?
data.value: This will permanently purge all event logs. Continue?

data.name: This will permanently purge all orphaned page attachments. Continue?
data.value: This will permanently purge all orphaned page attachments. Continue?

data.name: This will rebuild all pages in the wiki. This could take some time! Continue?
data.value: This will rebuild all pages in the wiki. This could take some time! Continue?

data.name: This will remove empty space from the database, which can free space if a lot of data has been deleted. Continue?
data.value: This will remove empty space from the database, which can free space if a lot of data has been deleted. Continue?

data.name: This will restore all built-in namespace pages, overwriting any customizations you may have made. Continue?
data.value: This will restore all built-in namespace pages, overwriting any customizations you may have made. Continue?

data.name: This will restore all default themes, overwriting any customizations you may have made in the database. Continue?
data.value: This will restore all default themes, overwriting any customizations you may have made in the database. Continue?

data.name: This will restore all Feature Templates, overwriting any customizations you may have made. Continue?
data.value: This will restore all Feature Templates, overwriting any customizations you may have made. Continue?

data.name: This will restore all Include namespace pages. Continue?
data.value: This will restore all Include namespace pages. Continue?

data.name: This will restore all Wiki Help namespace pages. Continue?
data.value: This will restore all Wiki Help namespace pages. Continue?

data.name: This will restore the deleted page and all of its history. Continue?
data.value: This will restore the deleted page and all of its history. Continue?

data.name: This will restore the deleted revision. Continue?
data.value: This will restore the deleted revision. Continue?

data.name: To use an authenticator app go through the following steps:
data.value: To use an authenticator app go through the following steps:

data.name: Truncating the page revisions will delete all the revision history for all pages and page attachments. This will leave only the most current revision of all objects. This is generally considered a big deal! Continue?
data.value: Truncating the page revisions will delete all the revision history for all pages and page attachments. This will leave only the most current revision of all objects. This is generally considered a big deal! Continue?

data.name: Use the Templates namespace to add a page to the list of templates, e.g. Templates :: My First Template.
data.value: Use the Templates namespace to add a page to the list of templates, e.g. Templates :: My First Template.

data.name: User created a new account with LDAP.
data.value: User created a new account with LDAP.

data.name: Various utilities to assist in management of the SQLite database.
data.value: Various utilities to assist in management of the SQLite database.

data.name: Verification email sent. Please check your email.
data.value: Verification email sent. Please check your email.

data.name: What did you change and why?
data.value: What did you change and why?

data.name: You are viewing a page revision which was deleted on {0} by {1}.
data.value: You are viewing a page revision which was deleted on {0} by {1}.

data.name: You are viewing a page which was deleted on {0} by {1}.
data.value: You are viewing a page which was deleted on {0} by {1}.

data.name: You are viewing revision {0} of "{1}" modified by {2} on {3}.
data.value: You are viewing revision {0} of "{1}" modified by {2} on {3}.

data.name: You can generate a new set of recovery codes.
data.value: You can generate a new set of recovery codes.

data.name: You can log in with a recovery code
data.value: You can log in with a recovery code

data.name: You do not have a local username/password for this site. Add a local account so you can log in without an external login.
data.value: You do not have a local username/password for this site. Add a local account so you can log in without an external login.

data.name: You do not have access to this resource.
data.value: You do not have access to this resource.

data.name: You have generated new recovery codes.
data.value: You have generated new recovery codes.

data.name: You have no recovery codes left.
data.value: You have no recovery codes left.

data.name: You have requested to log in with a recovery code. This login will not be remembered until you provide an authenticator app code at log in or disable 2FA and log in again.
data.value: You have requested to log in with a recovery code. This login will not be remembered until you provide an authenticator app code at log in or disable 2FA and log in again.

data.name: You have successfully logged out of the application.
data.value: You have successfully logged out of the application.

data.name: You have successfully signed in with LDAP but we still need a bit of information.
data.value: You have successfully signed in with LDAP but we still need a bit of information.

data.name: You have successfully signed in with the external provider but we still need a bit of information.
data.value: You have successfully signed in with the external provider but we still need a bit of information.

data.name: You must accept the policy before you can enable two factor authentication.
data.value: You must accept the policy before you can enable two factor authentication.

data.name: You must generate a new set of recovery codes before you can log in with a recovery code.
data.value: You must generate a new set of recovery codes before you can log in with a recovery code.

data.name: You should generate a new set of recovery codes.
data.value: You should generate a new set of recovery codes.

data.name: You've successfully authenticated with {0}. Please enter an email address for this site below and click the Register button to finish logging in.
data.value: You've successfully authenticated with {0}. Please enter an email address for this site below and click the Register button to finish logging in.

data.name: Your authenticator app has been verified.
data.value: Your authenticator app has been verified.

data.name: Your authenticator app key has been reset, you will need to configure your authenticator app using the new key.
data.value: Your authenticator app key has been reset, you will need to configure your authenticator app using the new key.

data.name: Your login is protected with an authenticator app. Enter your authenticator code below.
data.value: Your login is protected with an authenticator app. Enter your authenticator code below.

data.name: Your search criteria resulted in no pages, simplify your search text.
data.value: Your search criteria resulted in no pages, simplify your search text.

data.name: Basic wiki settings such as formatting.
data.value: Basic wiki settings such as formatting.

data.name: Configuration for Active Directory authentication using LDAP
data.value: Configuration for Active Directory authentication using LDAP

data.name: Configuration related to searching and indexing.
data.value: Configuration related to searching and indexing.

data.name: Filesystem location where persistent cookies are stored for saved session logins.
data.value: Filesystem location where persistent cookies are stored for saved session logins.

data.name: HTML email template for new account verification
data.value: HTML email template for new account verification

data.name: HTML email template to use when sending a password reset email.
data.value: HTML email template to use when sending a password reset email.

data.name: HTML placed inside the body tag but directly after the other body content.
data.value: HTML placed inside the body tag but directly after the other body content.

data.name: HTML placed inside the body tag but just before the other content of the page.
data.value: HTML placed inside the body tag but just before the other content of the page.

data.name: HTML placed into the footer section of the page.
data.value: HTML placed into the footer section of the page.

data.name: HTML placed into the header section of the HTML. A useful place to put scripts and CSS.
data.value: HTML placed into the header section of the HTML. A useful place to put scripts and CSS.

data.name: If set, users can not login until their email addresses are verified. If changed, the website will need to be restarted. Default: Enabled.
data.value: If set, users can not login until their email addresses are verified. If changed, the website will need to be restarted. Default: Enabled.

data.name: If set, users will be allowed to sing up and create their own account. Default: Enabled.
data.value: If set, users will be allowed to sing up and create their own account. Default: Enabled.

data.name: Maximum size in bytes for a user any page attachment.
data.value: Maximum size in bytes for a user any page attachment.

data.name: Maximum size in bytes for a user avatar image.
data.value: Maximum size in bytes for a user avatar image.

data.name: Maximum size in bytes for an emoji image.
data.value: Maximum size in bytes for an emoji image.

data.name: Membership settings such as defaults for new members and permissions.
data.value: Membership settings such as defaults for new members and permissions.

data.name: Number of hours before cookies expire.
data.value: Number of hours before cookies expire.

data.name: Show Last Modified on Page Footer
data.value: Show Last Modified on Page Footer

data.name: The account name to use for all email communications.
data.value: The account name to use for all email communications.

data.name: The base theme to use for all site styling.
data.value: The base theme to use for all site styling.

data.name: The brand image of the wiki, this is displayed on the top of all wiki pages.
data.value: The brand image of the wiki, this is displayed on the top of all wiki pages.

data.name: The copyright of the wiki, this is shown at the bottom of all pages.
data.value: The copyright of the wiki, this is shown at the bottom of all pages.

data.name: The country to use for the site culture for guests.
data.value: The country to use for the site culture for guests.

data.name: The default country to use for new accounts.
data.value: The default country to use for new accounts.

data.name: The default domain to use when the user does not specify a UPN or a fully qualified domain\\Username when signing in.
data.value: The default domain to use when the user does not specify a UPN or a fully qualified domain\\Username when signing in.

data.name: The default height to scale emojis to. The width will be scaled to the same ratio. Default: 24.
data.value: The default height to scale emojis to. The width will be scaled to the same ratio. Default: 24.

data.name: The default language to use for new accounts.
data.value: The default language to use for new accounts.

data.name: The default role to assign accounts when they sing up. Default: Contributor.
data.value: The default role to assign accounts when they sing up. Default: Contributor.

data.name: The default time zone to use for new accounts.
data.value: The default time zone to use for new accounts.

data.name: The display name to show for all email communications.
data.value: The display name to show for all email communications.

data.name: The footer of the wiki, this is shown at the bottom of all pages.
data.value: The footer of the wiki, this is shown at the bottom of all pages.

data.name: The fully qualified domain name to use when performing LDAP authentication.
data.value: The fully qualified domain name to use when performing LDAP authentication.

data.name: The internet address of your wiki.
data.value: The internet address of your wiki.

data.name: The language to use for the site culture for guests.
data.value: The language to use for the site culture for guests.

data.name: The memory limit (in megabytes) for the cache. Oldest items will be ejected when limit is reached. Default: 1024.
data.value: The memory limit (in megabytes) for the cache. Oldest items will be ejected when limit is reached. Default: 1024.

data.name: The name of the wiki page to display when a non existing page is requested.
data.value: The name of the wiki page to display when a non existing page is requested.

data.name: The name of the wiki page to display when a non existing page revision is requested.
data.value: The name of the wiki page to display when a non existing page revision is requested.

data.name: The name of the wiki page to use as the default content when new wiki pages are created.
data.value: The name of the wiki page to use as the default content when new wiki pages are created.

data.name: The name of the wiki, this is displayed everywhere.
data.value: The name of the wiki, this is displayed everywhere.

data.name: The number of items to return when pagination is used. Default: 20.
data.value: The number of items to return when pagination is used. Default: 20.

data.name: The number of recently modified pages to show on users public profiles. Default: 10.
data.value: The number of recently modified pages to show on users public profiles. Default: 10.

data.name: The number of seconds to cache pages in memory (0 = disabled). Default: 300.
data.value: The number of seconds to cache pages in memory (0 = disabled). Default: 300.

data.name: The SMTP password to use when sending email.
data.value: The SMTP password to use when sending email.

data.name: The SMTP port to use when sending email. Default: 587.
data.value: The SMTP port to use when sending email. Default: 587.

data.name: The SMTP server ip/host to use when sending email.
data.value: The SMTP server ip/host to use when sending email.

data.name: The time zone to use for the site culture for guests.
data.value: The time zone to use for the site culture for guests.

data.name: Value between 0.0 and 1.0 that determines how strong of a match a page search needs to be before it it returned in search results. Default: 0.6.
data.value: Value between 0.0 and 1.0 that determines how strong of a match a page search needs to be before it it returned in search results. Default: 0.6.

data.name: When building a search index, these words will be excluded from indexing. (Comma separated)
data.value: When building a search index, these words will be excluded from indexing. (Comma separated)

data.name: When comments are enabled, this option causes comments to be shown at the bottom of each page. Default: Enabled.
data.value: When comments are enabled, this option causes comments to be shown at the bottom of each page. Default: Enabled.

data.name: Whether a search box will be shown on the navigation bar. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Whether a search box will be shown on the navigation bar. Default: Enabled.

data.name: Whether or not OpenID Connect is enabled.
data.value: Whether or not OpenID Connect is enabled.

data.name: Whether or not the engine should perform a lazy pre-load of all animated emojis on startup.
data.value: Whether or not the engine should perform a lazy pre-load of all animated emojis on startup.

data.name: Whether or not to authenticate with LDAP when attempting to login users.
data.value: Whether or not to authenticate with LDAP when attempting to login users.

data.name: Whether or not to use a secure connection to LDAP. This is not always supported by domains.
data.value: Whether or not to use a secure connection to LDAP. This is not always supported by domains.

data.name: Whether page comments will be enabled. Authentication is required for comment, but all can read. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Whether page comments will be enabled. Authentication is required for comment, but all can read. Default: Enabled.

data.name: Whether SMTP should connect using SSL or not.
data.value: Whether SMTP should connect using SSL or not.

data.name: Whether the description of the page should be included in the HTML head meta. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Whether the description of the page should be included in the HTML head meta. Default: Enabled.

data.name: Whether the top menu should stay in place when scrolling vertically.
data.value: Whether the top menu should stay in place when scrolling vertically.

data.name: Whether the wiki tags attached to the page should be included in the HTML head meta keywords. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Whether the wiki tags attached to the page should be included in the HTML head meta keywords. Default: Enabled.

data.name: Whether to allow non-exact matches when searching. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Whether to allow non-exact matches when searching. Default: Enabled.

data.name: Whether to record page wiki Record compilation metrics to the database. This can be used for performance turning, but can itself cause slowness. Default: Disabled.
data.value: Whether to record page wiki Record compilation metrics to the database. This can be used for performance turning, but can itself cause slowness. Default: Disabled.

data.name: Whether to show the last user and date that a page was modified with a link to the public user profile. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Whether to show the last user and date that a page was modified with a link to the public user profile. Default: Enabled.

data.name: Whether to show the textbox to allow the user to enter a change summary when editing pages.
data.value: Whether to show the textbox to allow the user to enter a change summary when editing pages.

data.name: Whether to split CamelCasedStrings when parsing pages for search tokens. This can be helpful when pages contain a lot of programming/code content. Default: Enabled.
data.value: Whether to split CamelCasedStrings when parsing pages for search tokens. This can be helpful when pages contain a lot of programming/code content. Default: Enabled.

data.name: Whether users are required to enter a change summary when editing pages. Note that "Show Change Summary when Editing" must also be enabled.
data.value: Whether users are required to enter a change summary when editing pages. Note that "Show Change Summary when Editing" must also be enabled.

data.name: Whether visitors can view members and their public profiles.
data.value: Whether visitors can view members and their public profiles.

data.name: The account is already a member of the specified role.
data.value: The account is already a member of the specified role.

data.name: Are you sure you want to remove the permission from this account?
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove the permission from this account?

data.name: Are you sure you want to remove the role from this account?
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove the role from this account?

data.name: You must select a permission disposition.
data.value: You must select a permission disposition.

data.name: You must select either page or namespace.
data.value: You must select either page or namespace.

data.name: The account already has the specified permission.
data.value: The account already has the specified permission.

data.name: Are you sure you want to remove the permission from this role?
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove the permission from this role?

data.name: Are you sure you want to remove the member from this role?
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove the member from this role?

data.name: The role already has the specified permission.
data.value: The role already has the specified permission.

data.name: Failed to get information from external provider
data.value: Failed to get information from external provider

data.name: You cannot revert to the current page revision.
data.value: You cannot revert to the current page revision.

data.name: The specified page could not be found.
data.value: The specified page could not be found.

data.name: The page could not be found.
data.value: The page could not be found.

data.name: You cannot delete the only existing revision of a page, instead you would need to delete the entire page.
data.value: You cannot delete the only existing revision of a page, instead you would need to delete the entire page.

data.name: Page revision has been moved to the deletion queue.
data.value: Page revision has been moved to the deletion queue.

data.name: All page revisions have been truncated.
data.value: All page revisions have been truncated.

data.name: The page deletion queue has been purged.
data.value: The page deletion queue has been purged.

data.name: The page revision has been purged from the deletion queue.
data.value: The page revision has been purged from the deletion queue.

data.name: The page revision has been restored.
data.value: The page revision has been restored.

data.name: The page has been purged from the deletion queue.
data.value: The page has been purged from the deletion queue.

data.name: The page has been moved to the deletion queue.
data.value: The page has been moved to the deletion queue.

data.name: All orphaned page attachments have been purged.
data.value: All orphaned page attachments have been purged.

data.name: The pages orphaned attachments have been purged.
data.value: The pages orphaned attachments have been purged.

data.name: The menu item has been created.
data.value: The menu item has been created.

data.name: The menu item has been saved.
data.value: The menu item has been saved.

data.name: The specified menu item has been deleted.
data.value: The specified menu item has been deleted.

data.name: The configuration has been saved successfully!
data.value: The configuration has been saved successfully!

data.name: Emoji name is already in use.
data.value: Emoji name is already in use.

data.name: Could not save the attached image, too large.
data.value: Could not save the attached image, too large.

data.name: Could not save the attached image.
data.value: Could not save the attached image.

data.name: The emoji has been saved successfully!
data.value: The emoji has been saved successfully!

data.name: The specified emoji has been deleted.
data.value: The specified emoji has been deleted.

data.name: All event logs have been purged.
data.value: All event logs have been purged.

data.name: LDAP challenge succeeded, but the user does not have an objectGUID attribute.
data.value: LDAP challenge succeeded, but the user does not have an objectGUID attribute.

data.name: The specified role has been deleted.
data.value: The specified role has been deleted.

data.name: Role name is already in use.
data.value: Role name is already in use.

data.name: Account name is already in use.
data.value: Account name is already in use.

data.name: Email address is already in use.
data.value: Email address is already in use.

data.name: Could not save the attached image, type not allowed.
data.value: Could not save the attached image, type not allowed.

data.name: The profile has been saved successfully!
data.value: The profile has been saved successfully!

data.name: Could not save the attached file, too large
data.value: Could not save the attached file, too large

data.name: The page is protected and cannot be deleted. A moderator or an administrator must remove the protection before deletion.
data.value: The page is protected and cannot be deleted. A moderator or an administrator must remove the protection before deletion.

data.name: The page is protected and cannot be modified except by a moderator or an administrator unless the protection is removed.
data.value: The page is protected and cannot be modified except by a moderator or an administrator unless the protection is removed.

data.name: A change summary is required for page edits.
data.value: A change summary is required for page edits.

data.name: The characters '::' are used to denote a namespace name. A page name cannot contain more than one set of these characters.
data.value: The characters '::' are used to denote a namespace name. A page name cannot contain more than one set of these characters.

data.name: The page name you entered already exists.
data.value: The page name you entered already exists.

data.name: The specified user was not found.
data.value: The specified user was not found.

data.name: The latest compilation statistics for all wiki pages.
data.value: The latest compilation statistics for all wiki pages.

data.name: Note that each save button saves all sections, multiple are provided for convenience.
data.value: Note that each save button saves all sections, multiple are provided for convenience.

data.name: The number of seconds a user must wait before their view of a page is counted again. 0 means no delay.
data.value: The number of seconds a user must wait before their view of a page is counted again. 0 means no delay.

data.name: The latest page statistics for all wiki pages.
data.value: The latest page statistics for all wiki pages.

data.name: Purging the page statistics will delete all of the stored statistics for all pages. Continue?
data.value: Purging the page statistics will delete all of the stored statistics for all pages. Continue?
